queries.question: Provide a list of all jazz bands and also provide a list of rock bands founded in 1970.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jazz_Bands.band
FROM Jazz_Bands
UNION
SELECT Rock_Bands.band
FROM Rock_Bands
WHERE Rock_Bands.Founding_Year = 1970

queries.question: Show jazz bands and rock bands founded in 1970.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jazz_Bands.band
FROM Jazz_Bands
WHERE Jazz_Bands.Founding_Year = 1970
UNION
SELECT Rock_Bands.band
FROM Rock_Bands
WHERE Rock_Bands.Founding_Year = 1970

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show jazz bands and rock bands founded in 1970.
